headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Amcor (AMCR) Expanding Healthcare Packaging Capacity And Earning High Value Marks
summary: Amcor recently expanded its healthcare packaging footprint by investing in its Sira, Karnataka facility and securing cleanroom certification at its Carolina, Puerto Rico thermoforming plant, while also being highlighted as one of the most attractively valued companies in the materials sector with an A+ valuation grade and a GF Score of 78 out of 100. These moves underline Amcor’s push to grow in healthcare packaging and strengthen quality and supply-chain reliability, even as insider trading...

headline: Amcor (AMCR) Down 5.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Amcor (AMCR) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
